description: You are a transit planner for a city transportation authority, converting a defunct commercial building into a regional bus transit hub. Using the pre-drafted building shell open in Sweet Home 3D, transform the space into a functional transit hub. Build at least 3 interior partition walls to enclose a private Driver Break Room and Public Restrooms, and place at least 4 interior doors or windows for access. Define and name at least 4 room zones (e.g., 'Waiting Area', 'Ticketing', 'Cafe', 'Restrooms') and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 2 of them. Furnish the Public Waiting Area with at least 16 chairs or benches in rows; the Ticketing Area with at least 2 desks and 2 office chairs; the Cafe/Kiosk
